cast.name: Dan Marshall
cast.character: Dread at Funeral & Helicopter Crash Scenes

plot outline: People are living their lives remotely from the safety of their own homes via robotic surrogates -- sexy, physically perfect mechanical representations of themselves. It's an ideal world where crime, pain, fear and consequences don't exist. When the first murder in years jolts this utopia, FBI agent Greer discovers a vast conspiracy behind the surrogate phenomenon and must abandon his own surrogate, risking his life to unravel the mystery.
title: Surrogates

distributors.name: Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures, Italia

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
The Newman Scoring Stage, Twentieth Century Fox Studios
